title: Millionfold v0.1.1
content:
Millionfold’s v0.1.1 update brings real-time visual previews and collision resolution modes to the batch image pipeline, improving safety and feedback during large-scale cataloging.

What changed:

  • Centered Flashing Preview: Added a Feed Display Mode selector to choose between history thumbnail grids, a large centered preview flashing each image dynamically, or both combined.
  • Local File Streaming: Added a GET file endpoint to safely stream processed image binaries directly from disk, ensuring instant local preview loads.
  • Duplicate Name Resolution: Added overwrite, suffix parenthesis (e.g. image (1).jpg), and duplicates-folder collision rules to handle duplicate filenames safely during copies.
